title: Quick Guide - Osprey/Tern - Custom Swipe animation screen
scenario: Quick Guide Custom Swipe animation cannot be interrupted by tap or swipe gestures during playback on Osprey/Tern
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with an Osprey or Tern device connected.
2. Open the Quick Guide from the Home screen.
3. Navigate to the 2nd screen (showing two earbuds).
4. Tap the right blue circle to zoom in and play the Custom Swipe animation.
6. After the animation ends, note the 'Replay' button that appears.
8. Observe that the animation replays while staying zoomed in.
9. During animation playback, tap anywhere on the screen.
10. During animation playback, swipe left or right.
expected:
- The Custom Swipe animation plays when tapping the right blue circle.
- After animation ends, a 'Replay' button appears.
- Tapping Replay replays the animation while staying zoomed in.
- Tapping anywhere or swiping left/right during animation does not interrupt playback.
- Tapping the blue circle again zooms out to show both earbuds.
